message:
feat(remote): add bounded capacity to eviction saga and harden idempotency store and remote bulkhead

Introduces bounded-capacity memory protection across the remote subsystem
to prevent unbounded growth in long-running node processes.

eviction_saga.rs:
- Add configurable max_audit_records and max_transitions_per_saga limits
  with sensible defaults (4096 and 512 respectively)
- EvictionSagaManager::with_capacities() constructor for custom limits
- Audit log and per-saga transition history now auto-drain oldest entries
  when capacity is exceeded (FIFO eviction)
- All phase transition methods (begin_upload, complete_upload, complete_verify,
  complete_retire, cancel) now thread the max_transitions limit through

idempotency_store.rs:
- +77 lines of new idempotency enforcement logic and test coverage

remote_bulkhead.rs:
- +101 lines expanding bulkhead isolation with new circuit-breaking and
  concurrency limit enforcement

virtual_transport_faults.rs:
- Minor cleanup to fault injection testing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
